notes: Deploy ordering: run scripts/migrations/20260708_add_speaker_cluster.py up BEFORE deploying meeting-api (507K-row transcriptions; CONCURRENTLY index). Startup schema-sync skips the online_only index by design.
Soniox routing is opt-in: DEFERRED_TRANSCRIPTION_MODEL=stt-async-v5 + SONIOX_API_KEY on transcription-service; without them the Whisper + DOM-mapping path is unchanged.
